text:
GG0170D2_STTG_STNDG_GOAL_CD GG0170D2 Mobility: Sitting to Standing Goal by End of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's goal to move to a standing position from a sitting position in a chair or on the side of the
bed by the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching assistance
 05=Setup or clean-up assistance
 06=Independent
 ^=Blank (skip pattern)
